list.title: People
list.description: The people you've talked with, and those you've kept a record of. Tap a face to step into someone and look back, person by person.

empty.title: No people yet
empty.hint: Speakers show up here once you assign them in a conversation. Met someone offline? You can add them with “New person” first.

noMatch.title: No matching people
noMatch.hint: Try a different name or relationship.

brief.title: Before you meet
brief.subtitle: Right before you see {{name}}, take a quick look back at what matters and the threads still left open.

history.error: Couldn't load this person's conversation history.
history.emptyTitle: No lines assigned to this person yet
history.emptyHint: Once you assign a speaker to them in a conversation, the things they said will show up here.

analysis.note: The reading below is generated by a language model, with
analysis.noteEmphasis: every point tied to the original words and ready to replay
analysis.noteTail: — nothing made up apart from the facts.

relation.noteEmphasis: grounded in your real conversations, with sources you can replay

create.title: New person
create.description: Met someone offline who hasn't shown up in a conversation yet? Add them here first.
